title: LV Power and Automation
notes: Coke Oven multiblocks now use wrench-selected liquid output, clearer creosote handling, and better tank and pipe displays.
LV power now has amp-rated cables, battery buffers, sodium and lithium batteries, and a 4A Arc Furnace milestone.
Quest lines now teach the refreshed Steam, Coke and Steel, LV mechanics, battery, and aluminium progression paths.
